headline: Ford Falls Most in 15 Months After AI-Driven Rally Abates

headline: 1 Industrials Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Even if they go mostly unnoticed, industrial businesses are the backbone of our country. They are also bound to benefit from a friendlier regulatory environment with the Trump administration, and this excitement has led to a six-month gain of 17.7% for the sector - higher than the S&P 500’s 7.9% return.
